query_normalized: minwm: a full-stack open-source framework for real-time interactive video world models computer science
rationale: The paper studies video world models—a core mechanism of the user’s question—by introducing a geometry‑enhanced model (GEM‑4D) for real‑time prediction and robot manipulation, thus providing same‑mechanism evidence (criterion a) relevant to a full‑stack interactive video world‑model framework.
